question_text: What is the definition of power in physics?

options.label: A
options.text: The rate at which energy is transferred or work is done

options.label: B
options.text: The total amount of energy in a system

options.label: C
options.text: The speed at which an object is moving

options.label: D
options.text: The force applied to an object

explanation: Power is defined as the rate at which energy is transferred or work is done. It measures how quickly energy is being used or transferred. The SI unit of power is the Watt (W).
